name: public-threat-actor-monitor
title: Ransomware Victim Claims & Recent CVE Monitor
description: Track recent ransomware victim claims, matched company/watchlist terms, the data actors say they have, RansomLook recent posts, RansomLook RSS, RansomLook search, RansomLook post index, ransomware.live, novel DLS Monitor claims, CISA known-exploited CVEs, and recent NVD CVE updates. Start with a low-cost company or watchlist preview, then switch to full mode for monitoring exports.

exampleRunInput.body:
{
  "runMode": "preview",
  "queries": [
    "qilin",
    "akira",
    "lockbit3",
    "play",
    "clop"
  ],
  "maxTotalRows": 500,
  "maxRowsPerQuery": 250,
  "includeActivity": true,
  "includeTargets": false,
  "includeTtps": false,
  "includeSources": false,
  "includeDatasets": false,
  "includeCoverageGaps": false,
  "includeHeldRows": false
}
